lrc:
[00:00.72]Morning finds me where I stand
[00:00.80]With empty pockets, open hands
[00:01.03]Every step may feel so small
[00:01.34]Still I'm moving through it all
[00:08.48]Clouds may hide the morning light
[00:43.12]But they never stop the sky
[00:45.52]Every heartbeat softly says
[00:48.40]Keep believing anyway
[00:50.94]Take it slow
[00:52.76]Take your time
[00:54.52]Every sunrise starts the same
[00:57.36]One small light
[00:59.04]One small dream
[01:00.78]That's enough to find the way
[01:05.00]Tomorrow starts today
[01:08.22]One little step at a time
[01:11.36]Even when the road is long
[01:14.42]The stars still shine
[01:17.56]Hold your head up high
[01:21.44]Don't be afraid
[01:23.74]Every dream begins
[01:29.36]Tomorrow starts today
[01:39.34]Every story has a page
[01:43.88]Waiting for a brighter day
[01:46.34]Every answer that we seek
[01:49.12]Grows inside us quietly
[01:52.04]If your hope feels far away
[01:55.92]Listen to your heart again
[01:58.58]You are stronger than you know
[02:01.56]More than yesterday
[02:04.58]When the night is falling
[02:08.26]When the silence stays
[02:10.12]Close your eyes
[02:12.10]You'll find
[02:14.98]The light remains
[02:40.30]Tomorrow starts today
[02:43.56]One little step at a time
[02:46.78]Every mountain starts below
[02:49.86]One steady climb
[02:52.98]Hold your head up high
[02:56.18]Don't be afraid
[02:58.90]Every dream begins
[03:04.52]Tomorrow starts today
